description_long: This object is a stylized depiction of an AK-pattern assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, all rendered in a warm brown color. The receiver, barrel, and other metallic components are finished in a dark blue-gray, giving the rifle a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a standard-length barrel, with a slanted muzzle device at the end. Three detachable curved box magazines, also in dark blue-gray, are shown alongside the rifle, emphasizing its semi-automatic or automatic functionality. The overall design is iconic and instantly recognizable, with a blend of wood and metal materials typical of classic military rifles. The object is detailed enough to show key features such as the trigger, magazine release, and charging handle.
description: A stylized AK-pattern rifle with a wooden fixed stock, dark metal receiver, and three curved detachable magazines. The rifle features iron sights and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, and three curved magazines.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, wooden components, and the three magazines.
